testcase.name: invalidLoginTest

error.message: [public void com.test.base.BaseTest.invalidLoginTest(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) throws java.lang.Exception] has no parameters defined but was found to be using a data provider (either explicitly specified or inherited from class level annotation). Data provider mismatch Method: invalidLoginTest([java.lang.String arg0, java.lang.String arg1]) Arguments: [(java.lang.String) mac]

testcase.name: searchTest

error.message: [public void com.test.base.BaseTest.searchTest(java.lang.String)] has no parameters defined but was found to be using a data provider (either explicitly specified or inherited from class level annotation). Data provider mismatch Method: searchTest([java.lang.String arg0]) Arguments: [(java.lang.String) rohini1@gmail.com,(java.lang.String) Rohini_16]
